ddls:
CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient the image belongs to */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was acquired */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was uploaded */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., dermoscopic, macroscopic) */,
  "image_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the image (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "anonymized" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the image has been anonymized */,
  "consent_given" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the patient has given consent for the image to be used in research */,
  "clinical_notes" TEXT /* Clinical notes or observations related to the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Brief medical history of the patient */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* List of known allergies */,
  "family_history" TEXT /* Relevant family medical history */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Patient's ethnicity */,
  "smoking_status" TEXT /* Smoking status of the patient */,
  "alcohol_use" TEXT /* Alcohol use of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the label (e.g., MEL for melanoma) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the label */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the condition (e.g., mild, moderate, severe) */,
  "clinical_implications" TEXT /* Clinical implications of the label */,
  "recommended_treatment" TEXT /* Recommended treatments for the label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_labels" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the image */,
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the label associated with the image */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the label assignment */,
  "annotator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who assigned the label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id", "label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_labels_annotator_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, clinician, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the image */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the image */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the image */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the image being annotated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the annotation */,
  "annotation_data" TEXT /* Data representing the annotation (e.g., coordinates, notes) */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was made */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., point, polygon, text) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the annotation */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who reviewed the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "training_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of model training */,
  "training_end_date" TEXT /* End date of model training */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "training_dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used for training the model */,
  "model_metrics" TEXT /* Additional metrics (e.g., precision, recall) */,
  "trained_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who trained the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_trained_by FOREIGN KEY ("trained_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
